title: Tilray Brands Inc. Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Tilray Brands Q3 2023 earnings call revealed expectations for Wall Street of a per-share loss of 6 cents on revenue of $150.13 million. For the full year ending in December, the loss was expected to be 28 cents per share with full-year revenue expected to decline 3.3% year over year to $607.62 million. While management had expanded the company's reach into international markets, investors were waiting for clearer signs of operational improvement. The company remained focused on securing its niche in THC-based products in the U.S., though this remained limited until the U.S. Federal government fully legalized cannabis sales.
